subject: New Assignment: Microservices Engineer – Java – Healthcare
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the healthcare sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a senior Microservices Engineer with strong experience in Java. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:

  • Java
  • GCP
  • Docker Compose
  • MySQL

Details:
Client: VitalisIT
Start: ASAP
Duration: 12 months
Location: Stockholm (remote)
Rate: up to 975 SEK/h

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Lena Eriksson
Business Director
TechLink Sweden
Tel: +46 73 345 67 89
